data.body: MISLEADING-MESSAGE FIX (in scope per Joe; mapping fix 6173 explicitly OUT of scope): bug c672 — reconciler preflight StatusMappingError said 'local status IDEA not in local_to_jira_status' but the checked value can be a Jira-status value (IDEA was added Jira-side), so it mislabeled a Jira status as local and misdirected debugging. Fixed reconcile.py message + StatusMappingError docstring to state the status is unmapped in either direction / may originate Jira-side; RED->GREEN test in test_status_preflight.py; no behavior change. Landed as INDEPENDENT Gerrit change 330 (branch reconcile-msg-fix off latest origin/main 9c58eee21 — NOT in the epic stack). c672 CLOSED+signed. NOTE: message-only fix does NOT resolve the reconciler abort; the idea<->IDEA MAPPING (story 6173/tawny-herb-bug) is the unblock and is out of my scope. Epic #16 stack unchanged: 325 f93a, 327 4b56, 328 f983, 329 3c5d (all closed+signed).
